# PERF-017 positive: strings.Join inside loop on request path
lang: go
file: PERF-017-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func Handle(c *gin.Context) {
	var lines []string
	for _, v := range c.Request.Header.Values("X-Forwarded-For") {
		lines = append(lines, strings.Join(strings.Split(v, ","), ";"))
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"forwarded": lines})
}
